name: Disclosure Nav
summary: Horizontal APG Disclosure Navigation header: a row of section heads, each disclosing an absolutely-positioned dropdown panel below it (collapsing to an inline accordion under 940px). The horizontal-popup counterpart of the vertical sectioned-nav, it reproduces the WE-docs site nav and mounts in the #865 chrome header (#931). Packaged as the persistent light-DOM `<we-disclosure-nav>` custom element (#1615, B-mechanism per block-standard §7) whose reactive `config` property re-renders the nav; the headless nav:menubar + nav:section traits stay attachable to author markup. Click/Enter/Space toggles a section (opening one closes its siblings), Escape collapses the open one, an outside click dismisses, and the active link carries aria-current.

disclosureNavigation.pattern: Disclosure Navigation Menu — section heads expose aria-expanded + aria-controls over dropdown panels
disclosureNavigation.adoption: Each section head is a button with aria-expanded/aria-controls disclosing an absolutely-positioned panel; click toggles (siblings close), Escape collapses the open section and refocuses its head

ariaCurrent.pattern: aria-current='page' marks the link for the current page
ariaCurrent.adoption: The link for the current route carries aria-current='page'
